evals.expected_output: BibTeX @inproceedings entry for 'Efficient Streaming Language Models with Attention Sinks' at ICLR 2024, NOT an arXiv preprint entry
expectations: Year is 2024 (ICLR publication year, not 2023 arXiv upload year)
A '% source:' provenance comment is present
The source is NOT arXiv — it comes from a Tier 1 or Tier 2 source
Author list includes Guangxuan Xiao as first author

evals.prompt: I need the bibtex for "Attention Is All You Need"
evals.expected_output: BibTeX entry for Vaswani et al. 'Attention Is All You Need' at NeurIPS 2017
expectations: Booktitle references NeurIPS or NIPS (2017 was still called NIPS)
A '% source:' provenance comment is present
BibTeX key follows lastname_year style (e.g., vaswani2017attention or similar)

evals.prompt: add a citation for the LoRA paper by Hu et al.
evals.expected_output: BibTeX @inproceedings entry for 'LoRA: Low-Rank Adaptation of Large Language Models' at ICLR 2022
expectations: Author list includes Edward J. Hu or Hu as first author

The source is NOT arXiv — comes from Tier 1 or Tier 2
